chinese_news.title: Agent、多模态、应用、算力一天看尽，峰会亮点在此｜5.20日，来现场一起AI
chinese_news.summary:
进入2026，AI愈发狂飙突进。围观体验之余，人人不免在心中自问：

朋友圈刷屏的“龙虾”、Harness等AI新事物，跟我到底有什么关系？真的有必要跟吗？

AI创业、AI融资如火如荼，属于我的机会又在哪里？

别人已经在用AI做视频、写代码、跑项目，我是不是已经慢了一拍？

……

到最后，几乎所有问题都会汇成同一个问题：我，到底该如何用AI？

如果你对这些问题还很模糊，不妨来第四届中国AIGC产业峰会走一趟——一天时间，把这一年AI产业最值得关注的人、事、判断，一次性讲清楚。

先提前剧透一波。

18位重磅嘉宾，1场Agent主题圆桌，1份年度榜单，1张全景图谱——所有内容都已敲定。 

阵容上，既有昆仑万维、智谱、商汤、百度、蚂蚁、MiniMax这样的行业头部，也有亚马逊云科技、硅谷Fusion Fund带来的全球视角；既有复旦邱锡鹏、港大黄超代表的

chinese_news.title: 「宇石空间」完成5亿元A轮融资，今年计划交付三枚火箭，累计融资额已达10亿元｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，宇石空间已完成5亿元A轮融资，由高榕创投、昆仑资本联合领投，建发新兴、蓝湖资本、弘晖基金、东证资本、臻泰资本、庚辛资本跟投；产业方股东紫金矿业、知名互联网战投、智能终端产业方联合投资，老股东高瓴创投、基石资本、千乘资本、知盛睿盈连续多轮追投。

本轮资金将主要用于火箭总装测试、筷子回收技术验证、火箭产能建设和团队建设，为宇石空间AS-1火箭首飞及后续规模化运营提供保障。

宇石空间是我们长期关注的企业，专注于大运力、低成本、快速复用液体火箭的研制。在过去一年，公司已连续完成4轮融资，加上近期交割完的A轮，其累计融资额已达10亿元。

火箭制造及发射服务作为商业航天产业链条中的核心环节，向来是资本押注的重点，而可复用火箭作为

chinese_news.title: 对话万成云商：发文章≠GEO优化，大模型不是喂什么就推什么
chinese_news.summary:
“帮我搭配一套适合海边度假的衣服。”

“帮我推荐一家适合约会的西餐厅。”

“3000元预算，买哪款扫地机器人最划算？”

这类与AI的问答正发生在全球数亿用户身上。过去，人们会把这些问题输入百度、谷歌等搜索引擎，因此产生了SEO（Search EngineOptimization，搜索引擎优化）营销。而当流量入口从搜索引擎转向AI工具，GEO（Generative EngineOptimization，生成引擎优化）也应运而生。

区别于传统SEO追求的“搜索结果排名”，GEO的核心目标是让品牌信息在AI生成的回答中被优先引用和推荐。在AI全面渗透用户信息获取与消费决策场���的时代，对于出海企业而言，做好GEO意味着抢占新的流量入口。

GEO的逻辑和SEO有什么根本不同？为什么有人说GEO是伪命题？出海企业布局GEO该怎么做？中小企业如何低成本起步……带着这些出海企业关心的问题，我们特别对话了万成云商品牌出海事业部总经理谭莉，拆解AI搜索时代如何让企业被AI看

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 获超千万融资，「律动节拍」用演出票撬起千亿跨城观演赛道
chinese_news.summary:
36 氪获悉，「律动节拍」已于近期完成超千万级新一轮融资，由天空工场创投基金领投，投后估值达数亿元。

「律动节拍」成立于2025 年，是一家为用户提供跨城观演全消费场景的科技型文旅服务企业。公司聚焦 “因演出行” 垂直领域，以 “让一张票成为一座城市的游乐场” 为理念，搭建了面向 C 端用户的 AI演出行程管家。

依托集团其背后的生态资源与市场化合作，律动节拍已完成演出票品、酒旅、交通、餐饮、衍生品等多维度供给接入，通过AI与大数据模型训练，将演出资源与文旅资源整合，开发成为一站式定制化的演出行程管家产品 。

本轮资金将主要用于AI 演出行程管家产品研发、行业大模型训练、全域供应链深化及市场推广。

跨城观演越火，用户痛点越显现

近年来，国内现场演出市场持续升温，跨城观演成为常态。

中国演出行业协会数据显示，2025 年国内大型营业性演出票房突破 324 亿元，跨城观众占比普遍超过 60%，热门场次外地观众占比甚至达到 90%。

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨多款燃油车大降价，降幅最高近30%；蜜雪冰城上线黄仁勋同款饮品；“巴菲特慈善午餐”回归，获拍900万美元
chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

  • 张雪机车，再夺冠
  • 长安汽车否认与千里科技合作
  • 深圳发布2026年住房发展计划
  • 贵州茅台宣布公斤茅台等四款产品提价
  • 法拉第未来宣布获得2500万美元融资
  • 三星电子会长就公司“内部问题”公开道歉

TOP 3 大新闻

多款燃油车大降价，降幅最高近30%

日前，长安汽车旗下长安逸动经典版正式上市，新车售价6.49万元，限时享23000元购车现金优惠；相较于指导价8.79万元降幅达到26%。该款车型还享有限时的保养礼和流量礼。

其实，近期多家燃油车都开启了降价模式：起亚新狮铂拓界一口价10.99万元，较指导价15.49万元降29%；捷豹路虎5月12日推出限时“新发现”价；奇瑞4月中旬开展促销，综合补贴最高4万元；速腾2026款最低价11.99万元，降价3万元（降幅20%）；思域最低指导价9.7

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 对话韶音高层：开放式耳机，凭什么成为下一场颠覆TWS的“品类革命”？
chinese_news.summary:
从运动孤岛到品类革命：解构韶音的“开放式”野心与底层技术硬实力

在消费电子行业普遍面临增长红利见顶的今天，音频赛道却正在上演一场深刻的结构性变革。2026年5月15日下午，大雨初晴的深圳湾广场，Shokz韶音举办了备受瞩目的媒体专访会。韶音中国区CEO杨云与产品线总裁张浩锋悉数到场，向外界系统阐述了这家以“骨传导”和“运动”起家的品牌，如何在稳坐全球开放式耳机出货量第一王座的同时，向更广阔的泛场景音频帝国发起攻坚。

过去两年，开放式耳机在中国蓝牙耳机市场的整体销售额份额已率先突破30%。这不仅是一次产品形态的更迭，更是一场由韶音引领、正在席卷全球的“品类级替代”风暴。

一、 宏观战略与行业洞察：以“全场景品类替代”重塑全球音频版图

过去，大众对韶音的认知多停留在“专业运动”与“骨传导”这两个标签上。然而，在本次专访中，韶音高层明确指出，专业运动与泛场景用户从来不是一道非此即彼的选择题。韶音正在做的事情，是将用户的定义从最初的“专业运动人群”彻底拓展到“每一个需要开放聆听的用户”。

chinese_news.title: 又诞生一位千亿女富豪
chinese_news.summary:
示意图

自4月初以来，立讯精密股价上涨超过55%。

5月11日，立讯精密市值创下历史新高，达到了5542亿人民币。立讯精密掌舵者王来春持股18.75%，身价也突破了千亿人民币，成为国内白手起家的又一位千亿女富豪。

如果说4月以来的涨幅，是因为立讯精密“站在光里”，短期股价大涨或许与一则收购公告有关。

5月10日，公告显示立讯精密拟通过收购京西智行集团全部股权，间接拿下京西国际约59.50%股份，有望成为其最终控股股东。这是立讯精密继两年前收购德国莱尼后，在汽车领域的又一关

chinese_news.title: 3个人带100个AI程序员，一个月烧掉130万美元！OpenAI：钱我出
chinese_news.summary:
Peter Steinberger

编辑：所罗门

【新智元导读】3个人，100个AI agent，一个月烧掉130万美元——OpenClaw之父把软件开发变成了「AI流水线」，OpenAI替他买单。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $80,000 by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC slid below $77k on oil shock and Treasury yield surge; G7 meeting on Strait of Hormuz closure adds geopolitical risk premium to energy and carry trades.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk, CNBC Treasury yields reporting; oil price volatility tied to Middle East tensions (Iran Strait warnings)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum outperform Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio) by August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Tom Lee cited oil prices driving ETH selling pressure; high European energy costs creating AI infrastructure arbitrage—ETH plays that if energy normalization occurs.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Tom Lee analysis); CNBC 'High energy prices could derail Europe's AI race'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will U.S. Senate pass comprehensive crypto bill by October 15, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: NYDIG warning that Senate crypto bill is at risk beyond midterms if not passed by August 2026—August 15 deadline looming; creates binary regulatory clarity event.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph 'Senate crypto bill at risk beyond midterms if not passed by August'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Samsung Electronics avert strike and reach labor deal by May 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 47,000 workers on edge; South Korean government pressure signals imminent resolution or escalation—affects semiconductor supply and AI chip availability.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA close above $120 by July 15, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Energy cost disparity in Europe creating AI training/inference arbitrage; if U.S./Asia dominates due to cheaper power, NVDA inference/training demand concentrates; Treasury yields rising pressures semis.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC 'High energy prices could derail Europe's AI race'; global bond rout reporting

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's Strait of Hormuz 'insurance' scheme materialize and transact >$100 million notional in BTC by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: On-chain transaction analysis (blockchain explorer, Chainalysis, Iranian financial media reporting); CoinDesk/Cointelegraph coverage confirmation
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran sanction-evasion narrative is live but market hasn't priced in probability of actual settlement volume; creates levered macro-geopolitical bet on Bitcoin as reserve asset.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk and Cointelegraph both reporting 'Iran may be turning Strait of Hormuz into bitcoin-based insurance market'; U.S.-Iran tensions post-Feb 28 airstrikes

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI's agent/multimodal product roadmap (announced by May 2026) lead to >$5B cumulative enterprise spend on agent infrastructure by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: OpenAI earnings guidance, analyst estimates (Gartner, Forrester agent market sizing), enterprise AI spending surveys
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr reporting Chinese AI ecosystem treating agents as commodity (Dragonfly, Harness); English media has not yet priced agent TAM expansion; VC/analyst consensus lagging.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr 'Agent、多模态、应用、算力一天看尽' summit narrative; OpenAI agent cost-per-token efficiency improvements reducing deployment friction

market_questions_to_create.question: Will DeFi bridge exploits (including Verus $11.6M hack) result in >$50 million cumulative monthly losses by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Chainalysis, DeFi Hack Trackers, CoinDesk reporting; on-chain loss aggregation
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Two major hacks (Aave, Verus, Bitcoin Depot bankruptcy) within single news cycle; market treating as isolated; crypto institutional capital may flee to centralized venues if bridge risk cascades.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk 'Yet another crypto bridge falls victim to $11M hack'; 'Aave restores ether borrowing limits after $230M exploit'; trend acceleration

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. Treasury 10Y yield exceed 4.5% by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Treasury bond market close (Bloomberg, TradingView, Federal Reserve H.15 release)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Global bond rout + inflation fears gripping markets per CNBC; G7 finance ministers meeting on prolonged Strait of Hormuz closure; if closure persists, oil shock + fiscal stimulus = yield spike not yet fully priced.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC 'Treasury yields rise amid global bond rout as inflation fears grip investors'; G7 emergency meeting signaling economic concern

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Novo Nordisk's obesity drug revenue outside North America exceed $2B annually by end of 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Novo Nordisk earnings report (Q4 2026), Wall Street analyst consensus (FactSet, Bloomberg)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports strong U.S. launch and global expansion plans; obesity treatment is macro healthcare theme; replication in EU, APAC not yet reflected in mid-cap pharma sentiment.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC 'Novo Nordisk's next obesity battlefront: Winning beyond America'; international pricing/regulatory approvals accelerating

investment_theses.thesis: Rising Treasury yields + geopolitical oil shock (Strait of Hormuz closure risk) will compress risk-asset multiples through H2 2026, favoring long gold/DXY over equity beta.
supporting_signals: CNBC 'Treasury yields rise amid global bond rout'; G7 meeting on Hormuz closure economic consequences
CoinDesk 'Bitcoin slides under $77k as oil shock and Treasury yields hit risk assets'
BBC 'Trump warns clock is ticking for Iran'; escalation of U.S.-Iran tensions post-Feb 28 airstrikes
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump-Xi deal on soybeans/rare earths signals trade détente reducing geopolitical premium; China tariff cuts cool inflation narrative.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (USD strength) and GLD (gold), short SPY via 3–6 month puts or long VIX call spreads; hedge equity exposure via long BTC put collars

investment_theses.thesis: AI agent infrastructure cost efficiency (36Kr 'OpenAI: 3 people + 100 AI engineers, $130k/month') will trigger aggressive M&A consolidation in mid-tier AI SaaS by Q4 2026; favor acquirers like MSFT, GOOGL over standalone high-burn startups.
supporting_signals: 36Kr '3个人带100个AI程序员，一个月烧掉130万美元' (OpenAI subsidizing agent engineering cost)
CoinDesk 'Kraken cuts 150 staff amid AI efficiencies, potentially delaying IPO'; AI-driven cost compression in crypto ops
Cointelegraph agent/multimodal product roadmap narrative acceleration in May 2026
investment_theses.counter_view: Standalone AI startups (like Anthropic) may command premium valuations on differentiation; VC dry powder supports continued private funding.
investment_theses.expression: Long MSFT and GOOGL (mega-cap acquirers), short GTLB, APPF (mid-tier AI SaaS with high burn); or synthetic: long MSFT calls, short small-cap AI SaaS via sector ETF puts

investment_theses.thesis: DeFi bridge risk (cumulative $50M+ losses YTD) will accelerate institutional migration to custodial venues (Kraken, Coinbase, FTX recovery) and centralized staking; long COIN, short DeFi token pairs with bridge exposure.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk 'Yet another crypto bridge falls victim to $11M hack'; Aave $230M exploit + Verus $11.6M hack within single news cycle
Cointelegraph 'Crypto security is turning into an AI arms race as agents may overwhelm compliance teams'; behavioral fragility
Bitcoin Depot bankruptcy signaling retail trust erosion in decentralized custodial alternatives
investment_theses.counter_view: New bridge designs (Light Clients, zero-knowledge proofs) will reduce exploit surface; market may price in security improvements ahead of actual deployment.
investment_theses.expression: Long COIN perps or spot, short concentrated DeFi bridge tokens (AAVE, SNX exposure); or long BTC/USDC stablecoin yield (3-6% APY on FTX/Kraken) vs. short DeFi yield farming (structural risk premium compression)

investment_theses.thesis: European energy cost arbitrage will concentrate AI training/inference demand in U.S./Asia; NVDA demand shifts to inference chips (lower ASP, higher volume) over training; favor ETH/BTC ratio in crypto as AI energy cost becomes carry-trade friction.
supporting_signals: CNBC 'High energy prices could derail Europe's AI race with U.S. and China'
Tom Lee (Cointelegraph) 'Surging oil prices have been driving Ether selling pressure'; energy cost elasticity
36Kr Chinese AI summits (May 2026) treating energy/compute as primary competitive factor
investment_theses.counter_view: European renewable energy capacity + grid parity in 2026–2027 may reverse cost arbitrage; NVDA benefits from global scale regardless of energy geography.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC (macro inflation hedge tied to energy scarcity), short ETH (energy-cost-sensitive layer-1 validator model); or long NVDA call spreads (inference demand) vs. short AMD (European exposure); long MU (DRAM for U.S. inference clusters)

investment_theses.thesis: Samsung labor deal resolution (May 31 deadline) will unlock semiconductor supply normalization; shortage relief allows ASML, TSMC, QCOM to stabilize gross margins through H2 2026, favoring semiconductor exposure over AI-only narrative.
supporting_signals: CNBC 'Samsung strike involving 47,000 workers looms'; South Korea government pressure signals May resolution window
Global chip supply constraints cited across crypto mining, AI inference, consumer electronics
Cumulative wage-supply shock would cascade to ASML, TSMC order books if unresolved
investment_theses.counter_view: Strike escalation (prolonged shutdown) would further compress supply, benefiting existing inventory holders short-term but damaging long-term demand confidence.
investment_theses.expression: Long SMH (semiconductor ETF) or ASML calls through June 2026; long QCOM, NVDA call spreads; hedge with short SOL/crypto mining stocks (MARA, CLSK) if strike resolution deflates scarcity premium
